theme: research note gate parity and visible Thaumonomicon cleanup
parity_rule: No new mechanics/items/recipes/GUI controls. Preserve original TC4 data and use Forge 1.19.2 adapters only where direct 1.7.10 code cannot be used.
changes: Research-note edit/clear/solve packets now use open Research Table slot 1 instead of held-note fallback.
Added explicit ResearchTableInventoryRuntime helpers for open table note/tools lookup.
Research note hex hit radius tightened through TC4ResearchTableParity ledger.
Solved notes cannot be edited or cleared through ResearchNoteSolver.
Dragged aspect preview no longer paints a modern colored square background.
Thaumonomicon no longer shows raw visible Warp: N adapter label, while warp remains preserved in research data.
still_not_100_percent: Research Table / Research Note exact pixel and mouse parity still needs more source-level comparison.
Thaumonomicon still needs full page/icon/recipe-gate sweep across every ConfigResearch entry.
Arcane Workbench, Infusion Matrix, Aura Nodes, wands/foci, golems, taint, eldritch and worldgen remain partially adapter-based.
